PGSN.def:
There is no known vulnerability in the robot
Argument over each vulnerability Vulnerability A is not exploitedTest results Vulnerability B is not exploitedTest results
The server can deal with DoS attacks on the server Access restriction
PGSN.Goal:
The robot does not make unintended movements
Argument over the robot and the server
The robot behaves according to commands Argument over each threat
The server gives correct commands to the robot Argument over each threat
